Header file for retrieving distance units preference in the Pebble firmware shell.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a function [`sys_shell_prefs_get_units_distance`](<#sys_shell_prefs_get_units_distance>). The function is likely intended to retrieve the preferred units of distance from a system shell preferences module. The file includes another header file, `shell/prefs.h`, which suggests that it relies on definitions or declarations provided in that file. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
# Imports and Dependencies
